top_10.rationale: Matthew Fowler 'Python Concurrency with asyncio' (O'Reilly) — full book PDF covering coroutines, event loop lifecycle, tasks, single-threaded event loop concurrency model in depth.
Caleb Hattingh 'Using Asyncio in Python 3' (O'Reilly 2018) — book PDF specifically covering the event loop, its lifetime management, and asyncio's async programming model.
Springer book chapter 'Concurrency with AsyncIO' — covers asyncio.run(), event loop references, and concurrent task execution with a textbook-quality explanation.
Conference slides PDF 'Event-driven Programming with Python asyncio' — covers native coroutine concepts and standard asyncio support for event-driven concurrency.
PyCon DE 2018 'Concurrency in Python: concepts, frameworks, and best practices' PDF — explains event loop-based concurrency, asyncio's role, and I/O switching semantics.
